creator: vvd@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Sebastian Oswald from comment #34)
> One question though: given there are several security fixes involved in the version
> bump 1.3.2->1.8.1, might it be justified to also push this commit to quarterly?
merge-quarterly - yes, but let's wait a few days to test and update other modules, and then do it for all ports at once.
